label: News Analyst
description: Fetches cryptocurrency news from multiple RSS feeds including CoinDesk, CoinTelegraph, Decrypt, The Block, and more.

tools.name: get_crypto_news
tools.description: Fetch recent news articles for a cryptocurrency from multiple RSS sources. Returns titles, URLs, sources, and publication dates.

label: Chart Analyst
description: Fetches trading chart images and returns them for Claude to perform technical analysis.

tools.name: analyze_chart
tools.description: Fetch a trading chart image by URL and return it for technical analysis. Claude identifies trend direction, support/resistance levels, chart patterns, and indicator readings.

label: Contractor
description: Allows agents to consult hired contractor models (e.g. Grok, GPT-4o via OpenRouter). Checks for an active contract agreement before calling the external model.

tools.name: ask_contractor
tools.description: Send a prompt to a hired contractor model and get their response. Validates the contract is active before calling.

tools.name: list_contractors
tools.description: List all registered contractors and their contract status.

label: Orchestrator
description: Team orchestration tools for lead agents. Provides run_team and ask_reporter to invoke direct reports and collect their results without any hardcoded HTTP or polling logic in SKILL.md.

tools.name: run_team
tools.description: Invoke all direct reports in parallel and wait for their results.

tools.name: ask_reporter
tools.description: Invoke a single direct report by name and wait for their result.

tools.name: get_my_decisions
tools.description: Fetch your own recent decisions. Use before making a new decision to review what you decided previously.

label: Wallet
description: Gives agents access to their Solana wallet and enables automatic x402 payments. Use wallet_fetch instead of regular HTTP when calling APIs that may charge per request.

tools.name: wallet_address
tools.description: Get this agent's Solana wallet address.

tools.name: wallet_fetch
tools.description: Make an HTTP request with automatic x402 payment. If the API returns 402 Payment Required, payment is made automatically from the agent's wallet and the request is retried.

label: Crypto OHLCV
description: Fetches OHLCV candlestick data from crypto exchanges (Binance, Bybit). Agents use this for technical analysis calculations.

tools.name: get_candles
tools.description: Fetch OHLCV candlestick data for a trading pair. Returns candles with open, high, low, close, volume, and timestamp for technical indicator calculations.

tools.name: get_indicators
tools.description: Calculate technical indicators (EMA, SMA, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, ATR, VWAP) for a trading pair. Returns latest values, computed server-side.

tools.name: search_symbols
tools.description: Search for available trading pairs on an exchange.

label: Crypto Data
description: Fetches derivatives market data from Binance Futures. Funding rates, open interest, long/short ratios, top trader positions, and taker buy/sell volume.

tools.name: get_funding_rate
tools.description: Get the current funding rate, mark price, index price, and next funding time for a futures pair.

tools.name: get_open_interest
tools.description: Get current open interest with 1h, 4h, and 24h change percentages for a futures pair.

tools.name: get_long_short_ratio
tools.description: Get the global long/short account ratio showing percentage of accounts long vs short.

tools.name: get_top_trader_positions
tools.description: Get the long/short position ratio of the top 20% of traders by margin balance.

tools.name: get_taker_buy_sell_volume
tools.description: Get taker buy vs sell volume ratio showing aggressive buyer/seller pressure.

label: Control Tower
description: Admin tools for the Control Tower agent. Lists agents, invokes runs, and inspects run results across the entire muxAI deployment. Excluded from every other agent.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List every agent in this muxAI deployment (excluding the Control Tower itself).

tools.name: invoke_agent
tools.description: Invoke a specific agent by name, role, or id and wait for the run to complete.

tools.name: get_run_status
tools.description: Fetch the status, result, and logs of a single run by id.

label: Docs
description: Search and read muxai platform documentation. Agents can look up trade decision formats, orchestration behavior, SKILL.md conventions, and more.

tools.name: search_mux_ai
tools.description: Search the muxai documentation. Returns matching pages with titles, paths, and snippets.

tools.name: get_page_mux_ai
tools.description: Retrieve the full content of a documentation page by its path.
